SETTINGS.TITLE: Response Bot
SETTINGS.SUBTITLE: Configure the AI bot that automatically responds to customers and classifies conversations.

SEATS.TITLE: Available Acentos
SEATS.DESCRIPTION: Acentos are AI bot personas configured by the system administrator. Select one in the Configuration tab.
SEATS.EMPTY: No active acentos available. Contact your system administrator.

CONFIG.TITLE: Bot Configuration
CONFIG.LIST_DESCRIPTION: Each inbox can have one bot configuration. Create a configuration per inbox you want to automate.
CONFIG.EMPTY: No configurations yet. Create one to start automating responses.
CONFIG.DELETE_CONFIRM: Delete the configuration for "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
CONFIG.ENABLED_HINT: When enabled, the bot will respond to all incoming messages in this inbox.
CONFIG.LABELS_HINT: The bot will classify conversations using the enabled labels. Disable labels your business does not use.
CONFIG.MODEL_HINT: Used for conversation classification and replies. Falls back to the default AI Chat model if not selected.
CONFIG.AUDIO_MODEL_PLACEHOLDER: Select a model (or use text model)...
CONFIG.AUDIO_MODEL_HINT: Used to transcribe voice messages via Whisper. Falls back to the text model if not selected.
CONFIG.SETUP_LABELS_HINT: Creates the selected labels in your Chatwoot account if they do not exist.

LABEL_DESCRIPTIONS.proceso_venta: Customer is asking, quoting or placing an order
LABEL_DESCRIPTIONS.proceso_pago: Customer made an order and is about to pay or already paid
LABEL_DESCRIPTIONS.quejas_y_reclamos: Customer is upset, filing a complaint or claim
LABEL_DESCRIPTIONS.soporte: Customer needs technical help or support

DOCUMENTS.TITLE: Documents
DOCUMENTS.DESCRIPTION: Upload documents to the Minio bucket (same as AI Chat), then sync them here. Assign each document to a category so the bot uses it as context when responding.
DOCUMENTS.BUCKET_WARNING: The Minio bucket is not configured. Go to AI Chat Settings to configure the bucket connection.
DOCUMENTS.EMPTY: No documents yet. Configure your bucket in AI Chat settings and click Sync.
DOCUMENTS.DELETE_CONFIRM: Remove this document from the list?

JABVOX_RESPONSE_BOT.ERROR: An error occurred. Please try again.
